title: Single-cell genomics study of autism spectrum disorder - cell-type-specific transcriptomic signatures (dataset-linked)
scan_query: autism AND (scRNA-seq OR ATAC-seq) AND dataset
notes: Retrieved by GEO/SRA scan query. Based on search context, appears related to single-nucleus RNA-seq of autism postmortem brain. PubMed metadata API was unavailable during scan; full integration pending manual review. Likely deposited data in GEO. High priority for follow-up to retrieve GEO accession.
